title: Dev-loop perf gates (perf_gates_devloop.rs) + two-tier perf-gates design doc

n_choice.rationale: Handoff specified ~1K. CorpusFixture::small() is ~100 (insufficient); medium() is the closest first-class fixture (~1000). per_source/from_docs were available for a tuned size but medium() met the bar with no custom selection.

gate_disposition.hitl_rule: perf signals NOTIFY, structural invariants BLOCK (HITL 2026-06-01); plus 'keep one hard latency assert' so an orders-of-magnitude regression still RED-fails.
gate_disposition.structural_BLOCK: assert_vec0_row_count_matches_ingest + assert_fts_index_populated (hard assert in setup()) — catch batch-collapse 4a95cfd.
gate_disposition.soft_latency_NOTIFY: p50<=50ms / p99<=150ms (synthetic path) -> DEVLOOP_PERF_WARN status=OVER, never fails.
gate_disposition.catastrophic_BLOCK: p50>500ms / p99>1500ms (10x soft; synthetic path) -> hard assert — catches scanner-throughput 53a270d (orders-of-magnitude inflation).
gate_disposition.recall_NOTIFY: recall@10 >= 0.85 floor WARN on the REAL path only.
gate_disposition.embedder_signal_split: Synthetic isolates LATENCY (instant embed -> measured time is pure retrieval) and carries the latency gates; its recall is report-only (~0.35 @ N=1000 — a property of the sparse synthetic vectors, not a regression; mirrors AC-019). Real carries RECALL (dense vectors make ANN-fidelity meaningful); its latency is report-only (candle-influenced).

budget_numbers.hitl_approved_at: 2026-06-01 (gate 1 'Approve recommended' + 'perf notifies not blocks' + 'perf notifies/structural blocks' + 'keep one hard latency assert')
budget_numbers.canonical_anchor_for_reference: 10k tier AC-013 p50<=80 / p99<=300; recall floor 0.90 @ N=7667 (ANN-fidelity anchor 0.937)

timing.synthetic_warm_wall_s: ~16 (well under the 30s budget; default `cargo test perf_gates_devloop`)
timing.synthetic_cache: na — synthetic embed is instant, the PR-5 embed cache is irrelevant on this path (so cold==warm timing).

measured_synthetic.ac_013b_recall_at_10: 0.347 (report-only on synthetic; below the 0.85 real-path floor by design — sparse synthetic vectors quantize poorly)

timing.real_embedder: NOT measured this slice — opt-in (DEVLOOP_REAL_EMBEDDER=1 + default-embedder feature). Compiles clean under --features default-embedder. Real-path WALL time is candle-bound (warmup + GT query embeds are live), NOT <=30s; documented as an occasional end-to-end exercise, not the inner-loop signal.

red_shows_experiment.method: Throwaway tests appended to perf_gates_devloop.rs, run, then REVERTED (not landed). Symptom-injected at the seam each devloop gate watches.
red_shows_experiment.batch_collapse_4a95cfd: Wrote a SINGLE doc into a medium (~1000) fixture; assert_vec0_row_count_matches_ingest PANICKED: 'vector_default has 1 rows but 1000 non-empty-body docs were ingested — projection apparently dropped some'. RED-shows confirmed via structural assert.
red_shows_experiment.scanner_throughput_53a270d: Injected a 600ms per-query delay (proxy for the throughput regression's orders-of-magnitude p50 inflation); enforce_catastrophic_ceiling PANICKED: 'DEVLOOP CATASTROPHIC (013): p50=616ms > 500ms (10x soft budget)'. RED-shows confirmed via the hard catastrophic ceiling.
red_shows_experiment.note: Symptom-injection at the gate seam (not a literal revert of the engine commits) because the gates key on the observable symptom — row-count shortfall / orders-of-magnitude latency — which ANY underlying cause of these regressions produces. Both should_panic experiments passed (panicked as expected) then were removed.

devloop_numbers_contract.stable_line: DEVLOOP_NUMBERS ac=<013|013b|019> n=<N> samples=<S> p50_ms=<..> p99_ms=<..> recall_at_10=<NA|float> cache=<na|hit|cold|reason> embedder=<synthetic|real>
devloop_numbers_contract.uniform_across_acs: All three ACs emit the SAME keyed schema via emit_numbers(); for AC-019 the percentiles are the stress tail. AC-019 extra detail (baseline, thread shape, wall time) is on a separate DEVLOOP_AC019_DETAIL line so the common contract stays uniform (codex pass-1 finding 1).
devloop_numbers_contract.warn_lines: DEVLOOP_PERF_WARN ac=.. metric=.. value(_ms)=.. budget_ms=|floor=.. status=OVER|UNDER (notify-only). DEVLOOP_PERF_INFO ..disposition=report_only.. for the report-only paths.
devloop_numbers_contract.pr7_handoff: PR-7 parses the keyed DEVLOOP_NUMBERS fields per (ac, embedder); adding fields is safe, renaming/reordering keyed fields is breaking.

knobs.DEVLOOP_REAL_EMBEDDER: =1 -> real BGE (requires default-embedder feature; cold-cache allowed, warm re-run faster). Default unset -> synthetic.
knobs.FATHOMDB_CORPUS_CACHE_DIR: shared with the PR-5 harness; overrides the embed-cache dir.
knobs.not_AGENT_LONG: Devloop is NOT gated behind AGENT_LONG (that is the canonical tier's switch); devloop runs unconditionally on every cargo test.

codex_review.pass_1: BLOCK — (1) DEVLOOP_NUMBERS schema not uniform across ACs (AC-019 differed); (2) real 'requires warm cache' documented but not enforced; (3) comment wrongly claimed measured real pass is live query inference.
codex_review.pass_2: PASS — all three resolved; no BLOCK overridden. Re-confirmed catastrophic ceiling RED-shows scanner on synthetic, structural asserts guard batch-collapse, no production read-path bypass.
codex_review.fixes: AC-019 normalized onto emit_numbers() + separate DETAIL line; real cold-cache reconciled as ALLOWED + real latency made report-only; comment corrected + latency gates made synthetic-only / recall floor real-only (principled signal split).

verification.production_read_path: No bypass: writes via public harness/Engine API, reads via Engine::search (FTS5 + bit-KNN + f32 rerank); the raw rusqlite connection in ac_013b is read-only ground-truth only. The PR-5 cache caches embed INPUTS, not query RESULTS.

hard_constraints_respected.no_push: Nothing pushed to origin; PR-8 owns the 0.7.2 push.
hard_constraints_respected.tdd_red_first: RED-shows experiment is the RED phase (both regressions confirmed to fail before the gates were trusted).
hard_constraints_respected.codex_not_overridden: pass-1 BLOCK fixed -> pass-2 PASS; no BLOCK overridden.
hard_constraints_respected.embedder_identity_immutable: Untouched (synthetic GT reconstruction uses VaryingEmbedder::new, whose vectors depend only on dim+text).
hard_constraints_respected.single_writer_projection_freshness: Preserved — public Engine API only, no bypass (codex-confirmed).

footprint_discipline.pr7_files_untouched: dev/perf-history/, perf-regression-check crate, root Cargo.toml, .github/workflows/perf-canonical.yml, PR-7 STATUS row — all untouched.
footprint_discipline.status_edit: PR-6 row only (line 57); PR-7 row + header left as-is.
footprint_discipline.worktree: Implemented directly on local main (no parallel PR-7 in flight -> no collision risk; 'orchestrator's choice per slice' per STATUS baseline note).

follow_ups: PR-7 (perf regression detection) consumes the DEVLOOP_NUMBERS line — runs next (parallelizable pair with PR-6, now unblocked).
eu7_real_corpus_ac.rs SerializedBge Mutex holdover migration still deferred (noted in PR-5 closure; not in PR-6 scope).
Real-embedder devloop numbers are unmeasured this slice (opt-in); a future run with warm cache + default-embedder can record them.
